---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks, technical debt, or housekeeping needs
title: "Maintenance: "
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

## Current State
Describe the current state that needs attention.

## Desired State
Describe the desired state after maintenance is complete.

## Impact Assessment
- [ ] Affects performance
- [ ] Affects security
- [ ] Affects developer experience
- [ ] Affects code quality
- [ ] Affects documentation

## Proposed Approach
Describe how you think this maintenance should be handled.

## Dependencies
List any dependencies or related tasks that need to be considered.

## Scheduling Preferences
- [ ] Can be done anytime
- [ ] Should be done during low-traffic periods
- [ ] Needs to be coordinated with other teams
- [ ] Has a deadline: [specify date]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
